bullets: MONSTER POWER - This full function radio control comes with real rubber tyres that are perfect for even the toughest terrain!
TURBO MODE - This 1:18 scale Monster Truck has two speeds, so you can activate turbo mode and speed things up!

ALL TERRAIN - This real performance machine comes in an eye catching design that makes it stand out from the crowd! It makes a great gift for inside or outside use and is perfect for kids 3 years and over!
REAL PERFORMANCE MACHINES - Bladez RPM perfectly blends high performance with style making it perfect for kids and adults alike!
content.description: The Bladez RPM 1:18 RC Monster Truck with turbo mode and LED lights is unstoppable over tough terrain but fun to drive with easy control handset for all ages from 3 years and above. With a bright purple and green deco, it is an iconic real performance machine!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Radio Control Monster Truck, 1 x Handset Controller, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
